title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents an architecture for multi-agent systems that skips LLM calls where deterministic logic suffices, using a before_model_callback mechanism to route agent planning through code instead of models. The example uses the Spine and Sprout algorithm for marathon route planning across 1,000 agents while eliminating redundant token consumption.
